nodes.name: Daily 8AM Trigger (Weekdays)
nodes.notes: Fires every weekday at 8AM. Change cron to '0 8 * * *' for 7 days.

nodes.name: Config & Constants
nodes.notes: Single place to change all config. Increase leadsPerDay here.

nodes.name: LinkedIn Navigator Search
nodes.notes: Uses LinkedIn API. For Sales Navigator scraping use Phantombuster or Apify LinkedIn scraper node instead. See setup guide.

nodes.name: Read Existing Leads
nodes.notes: Read all existing rows to deduplicate. Set GSHEET_ID env var.

nodes.name: Enrich Email (Hunter.io)
nodes.notes: Hunter.io finds professional emails. 25 free/month. Set HUNTER_API_KEY env var. Falls back to empty string if fails.

nodes.name: Gemini — Draft Email
nodes.notes: Uses Gemini 1.5 Pro. Set Google Gemini credentials in n8n.

nodes.name: Send Email via Gmail
nodes.notes: Set Gmail OAuth2 credentials. ADMIN_EMAIL env var = your sending email.

nodes.name: Rate Limit Delay
nodes.notes: 2 second delay between emails to respect Gmail sending limits.

nodes.name: Gmail — Watch Inbox (Every Minute)
nodes.notes: Polls inbox every minute for new unread emails.

parameters.jsCode:
const email = $input.first().json;

const message = [
  `📩 NEW QUERY — Someone is interested in Krapton!`,
  ``,
  `From: ${email.fromEmail}`,
  `Subject: ${email.subject}`,
  `Summary: ${email.summary}`,
  `Urgency: ${email.urgency}`,
  email.isFromKnownLead ? `Known Lead: ${email.matchedLead?.['Full Name']} @ ${email.matchedLead?.Company}` : `Source: Cold inbound (not from our outreach)`,
  ``,
  `Preview: ${(email.bodyText || '').substring(0, 300)}`,
  ``,
  `→ Reply within 2 hours for best conversion rate!`
].join('\n');

return [{ json: { ...email, notificationMessage: message, notificationType: 'query' } }];

nodes.name: Telegram Admin Alert
nodes.notes: Set TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID and Telegram Bot credentials. Most reliable instant notification.

nodes.name: Email Admin Notification
nodes.notes: Backup notification via email in case Telegram fails.
